topics.title: Nancy's Dating Segment
topics.summary: The studio prepares for a segment where listeners can compete to date Nancy, the former manager and wife of Jackie Martling.

topics.title: Drunk Driving and Personal Relationships
topics.summary: The studio explores topics ranging from the consequences of drunk driving and community service to personal views on parenting, contraception, and health.

topics.title: Relationship Dynamics and Celebrity Gossip
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding personal views on parenthood, rumors surrounding Owen Wilson, an exchange of messages with Jimmy Kimmel, and a report of a fan's observation at the U.S. Open.

topics.title: Artie Lange's Apology Letter
topics.summary: The studio reviews a self-deprecating apology letter written by Artie Lange to a friend whose wedding he missed due to oversleeping after a poker marathon.

topics.title: Swinger Stories and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding past sexual experiences with a former partner, the rejection of an offer to appear on The Biggest Loser, and commentary on media coverage involving Whoopi Goldberg and P. Diddy.

topics.title: Nancy Martling Dating Segment
topics.summary: The studio hosts a segment featuring Nancy Martling as she discusses her separation from Jackie Martling and participates in a dating game to meet potential suitors.

topics.title: Potential Suitors for Nancy
topics.summary: The studio hosts several callers, including Irish John, Paulie, and Greg, as they compete for a chance to date Nancy.

topics.title: Dating Game Selection and Comedy Sketches
topics.summary: The studio facilitates a series of phone calls to select potential suitors for Nancy while featuring guest appearances from comedians and musical performances.

topics.title: Scott's Family Discussion and Jackass Stunts
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding Scott's family's reaction to his public antics, the filming of Jackass 2.5, and Bam's experiences with professional photography.

topics.title: Bam's Legal Troubles and Dubai Honeymoon
topics.summary: The studio explores Bam's legal disputes over his property in Pennsylvania, his interactions with fans, and a detailed account of the couple's invasive strip search by authorities during their honeymoon in Dubai.

topics.title: Travel Experiences and Music Promotion
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding personal travel experiences in Dubai, the promotion of the Viva La Bands music compilation, and a brief segment involving a caller's comment on traffic stress.

topics.title: Jerry Lewis and Media Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses Jerry Lewis's controversial remarks during a telethon, his career history, and various media tropes while also addressing past radio commercial experiences.

topics.title: Artie's Assistant Performance Issues
topics.summary: The studio explores a series of professional failures and organizational lapses by Artie’s assistant, Teddy, who struggles to manage schedules and logistics for the comedian.

topics.title: Teddy's Professional Failures and Personal Struggles
topics.summary: The studio explores the professional incompetence of an assistant named Teddy, who repeatedly fails to manage schedules and remains under the influence during work events.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Music Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news including Halle Berry's pregnancy, Nicole Kidman's personal revelations, a study on the mortality of rock stars, and critiques of recent music releases.

topics.title: Childhood Obesity and Iron Deficiency
topics.summary: The show discusses research linking childhood obesity to iron deficiency, the impact of junk food on youth health, and international efforts to curb school-based soda sales.

topics.title: Political Scandals and Celebrity News
topics.summary: The studio discusses Senator Larry Craig's legal issues, John McCain's interaction with students, the Iraq War's progress, Whoopi Goldberg's appearance on The View, Jerry Lewis's controversial remarks, Bill Murray's arrest in Sweden, and upcoming comedy tour dates.
